question: Will Sm2O3 Western (CIF Rotterdam) spot price exceed 12 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
reason: Samarium oxide prices are significantly below $12/kg, indicating low likelihood of exceeding $12/kg by May 31, 2026.
evidence: Samarium oxide price in Northeast Asia is $2.17/kg as of May 2026. ([businessanalytiq.com](https://businessanalytiq.com/procurementanalytics/index/samarium-oxide-price-index/?utm_source=openai))
Samarium oxide price in China is $2.26/kg as of May 19, 2026. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/samarium-oxides-999-min-price/956?utm_source=openai))
Samarium oxide price in China is $2,141.43/tonne (approximately $2.14/kg) as of May 22, 2026. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare%20Earth%20Oxides/201102250202?utm_source=openai))
